description_long: This is a rectangular blackboard with a thick, medium-brown wooden frame and a dark chalkboard writing surface. The front face displays a cafe menu written in white chalk, with decorative script reading 'Cafe Du Magh' and menu items such as coffee, tea, cake, and wine, each with prices. The corners of the frame are reinforced with black corner protectors, adding both durability and a subtle decorative touch. The writing surface appears smooth and matte, with no visible scratches or heavy wear, and the text is clear and legible. The back and sides of the object are plain, showing only the wooden frame without any additional features. This blackboard is likely intended for wall-mounting in a cafe or urban setting, serving as a menu or announcement board.
description: A rectangular cafe menu blackboard with a thick brown wooden frame, black corner protectors, and a clear chalk-written menu on a smooth dark surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the brown wooden frame, with no visible writing surface or details.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full chalkboard menu, decorative script, and black corner protectors on the wooden frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the frame's thickness without any visible writing or features.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back of the blackboard, revealing the plain wooden frame and the reverse side of the writing surface.
attribute_frame_design: thick brown wooden frame with black corner protectors
